notes: Bug confirmed: Badge component rendering inconsistency on /api/components page. Info/default badge 'v1.2' renders correctly with blue/teal pill-shaped background. Warning badge 'Deprecated' renders as orange text only WITHOUT background/pill styling. Danger badge 'Not found!' renders as red text only WITHOUT background/pill styling. Compare with Alert component on same page which correctly renders all 4 types (info/success/warning/danger) with proper colored backgrounds. Warning and danger badge types are missing their background color CSS styles.
